summary: Frontend testing completed for 3 new features: Terms/Privacy pages, Empty states (Analytics, Recent Extractions), and Footer links. All requested features working correctly. 429 error handler is MOCKED via axios interceptor.

terms_page: 13 legal sections present (Acceptance, Services, User Accounts, etc.)
privacy_page: 14 privacy sections present (Introduction, Data Controller, Data We Collect, etc.)
analytics_empty_state: Empty state 'No Analytics Yet' shown for new users
Empty state text explains user needs to make extractions
recent_extractions_empty_state: 'Go to Playground' link present in empty state
api_keys_page: Default Key created on registration (user starts with 1 key)
Key revoke functionality works (shows Revoked badge)
Usage instructions with curl example shown

critical_code_review_comments: Terms page has comprehensive legal content (13 sections)
Privacy page includes DPDPA 2023 compliance (14 sections)
Empty states have clear CTAs directing users to Playground
API Keys empty state exists but won't display since default key is auto-created
seed_data_creation: Test users created during Playwright testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Terms/Privacy pages at /terms and /privacy routes with comprehensive legal content, 2) Empty states for Analytics and Recent Extractions show 'Go to Playground' CTA, 3) API Keys page has empty state code but default key is auto-created on registration so it won't display, 4) 429 error handler is MOCKED via axios interceptor - opens upgrade modal on rate limit errors.

mocked_apis.429_error_handler: Axios interceptor catches 429 errors and opens upgrade modal (cannot test without hitting real rate limits)
mocked_apis.note: 429 behavior triggers on 'plan limit', 'extraction limit', or 'quota' in error message

features_verified.terms_page: WORKING - /terms with 13 legal sections, Back to Home nav
features_verified.footer_links: WORKING - Terms, Privacy links and 2025 copyright
features_verified.analytics_empty_state: WORKING - 'No Analytics Yet' with Go to Playground button
features_verified.recent_extractions_empty_state: WORKING - Empty state with Go to Playground link
features_verified.api_keys_empty_state: CODE EXISTS - But default key auto-created hides it
features_verified.upgrade_modal_429_handler: MOCKED - Cannot test without rate limits

notes: API Keys page: Users receive 'Default Key' on registration, so empty state [data-testid='empty-api-keys'] and [data-testid='create-first-key-btn'] won't display unless user has never had a key
When API key is revoked, it shows as 'Revoked' in the list (not deleted), so empty state still won't show
